title: Artillery & Armory
description: Artillery & Armory brings cool new weapons to your game that you can play around with.
body:
# Artillery & Armory

Artillery & Armory brings cool new weapons to your game that you can play around with.

## Features
- **Hammer:** It stunds the enemy on user crit and is tanky
- **Chamber:** It causes the player to be launched into the air
- **Kunai:** Can be thrown like a Trident and return to the user
- **Lance:** Using gives the player speed and even faster on a horse
- **Charge:** Gives speed and more damage and is used on the lance
- **Dazed:** Stuns the player for the duration of the effect
- **Festering:** It is simmilar to withering but it goes through armor
- **Explosives:** Makes the enemy get launch on a crit and item cooldown. This takes away the ablity for the player to launch themself. Only for the Chamber!
- **Inflict:** When the user uses the range cappibility for the Kunai it will take the negitive potion in your off-hand effect and apply it to the enemy. Only for the Kunai!
- **Horseback:** On using the charge ablity it gives the user the charge effect as well as makes the horse defence and speed higher. Only for the Lance!
